He supports the team every day.
Hi, it is nice to meet you. I am David, a partner from an innovation center in Italy.
Nice to meet you, David. I am Flavia, and I work at Sebrae in Sao Paulo.
Sebrae, very good. And what do you do there?
I am a consultant. I support small businesses and I manage projects in my region.
That is very interesting. What is the goal of your project?
Our goal is to help local products reach international partners like you.
Hi, I am Flavia. I work at Sebrae in Sao Paulo.
I am a consultant. I support small businesses.
I manage projects in my region.
Our goal is to help local products reach global partners.
Nice to meet you. Let us talk again next week.

Good afternoon, everyone, and welcome to our international mission. My name is Laura, and I am your host today. We start at two o'clock with a short presentation about small businesses in Brazil. After that, each consultant talks about their region and their projects. Please introduce yourself and your work when it is your turn. Thank you very much, and enjoy the afternoon.

Hi Flavia, this is David from the innovation center in Italy. It was very nice to meet you today. I really like your project about small businesses and local products. I want to send you some information this week, and I would like to schedule a short call next Wednesday. Are you free in the morning? Please let me know. Have a great day, and talk soon.

Flavia joins the international meeting and says good afternoon. She introduces herself and her job at Sebrae. She explains that she supports small businesses in her region. David asks a question about her project. Flavia answers and they agree to talk again next week.
